minimize_result: NOTHING TO MINIMIZE — after the fix the engine MATCHES headless FCP (worst frame f01, engine-vs-FCP MSE=-1.0 => 99.00 dB). The residual gap to the GUI GT (13.04 dB) is the bt709/ProRes-export color-space difference, NOT an engine bug. Before the fix the engine rendered a flat sepia photo-A across all 24 frames (mean-luma 90.7 every frame) because the bloom was DORMANT.

decoded_onset_ramp_math.scene: endSec=0.502s (playRange duration), 24 frames @30fps. NOT 1.270s — that was a filter-LOCAL keyframe time mis-read as scene time.
decoded_onset_ramp_math.bloom_0_transitionA: filter timing in=0.000 out=0.200 offset=-0.367. Threshold curve keyed at filter-LOCAL 0.3637(v100)->0.5895(v1); scene = local + offset => ramps 100->1 over scene t~0.00->0.22 (f00->f10) as A fades out. Blooms photo A.
decoded_onset_ramp_math.bloom_1_transitionB: filter timing in=0.234 out=0.534 offset=-0.767. Threshold curve keyed at filter-LOCAL 1.0313(v1)->1.2695(v100); scene = local + offset => stays 1 then ramps 1->100 over scene t~0.26->0.50 (f13->f23). Un-blooms B back to clean photo B in the tail.
decoded_onset_ramp_math.filter_math: PAEBloom bloomHeliumRender (register-decoded, prior ticks): withRadius=Amount(32), withBrightness=|Brightness-50|*4, withThreshold=Threshold. Amount/Brightness are STATIC (not animated); the animated param is THRESHOLD. Ships on the 8-bit glow path (FCT_BLOOM_FLOAT OFF) which matches GT's gentle ramp better than the float x10 extract.
decoded_onset_ramp_math.gt_shape: GT holds flat sepia photo A (mean~89) through f04, blooms f06->f14 to flash-white (mean 250, rgb 241,255,255), then decays f15->f23 revealing clean photo B (rgb 92,107,137).

root_cause: FOUR coupled time-authority bugs, NOT the bloom kernel: (1) animationEndSec derived from a filter-LOCAL keyframe (1.27s) without applying the filter timing offset -> window inflated 2.5x; (2) retime-wrap froze scene to t=0 (self-cancels once endSec corrected -> pureCrossfadeSettleB); (3) filter curves evaluated at wrapped content time + without the filter offset; (4) non-overlapping drop zones (A.out 0.200 < B.in 0.234) left a black gap.
fixes: parser/index.ts: re-anchor filter-enclosed curve keyframe times by the filter <timing offset> in the animationEndSec walk (scene = local + offset).
types.ts + parser/index.ts: parse Filter.timingOffsetSec from the <filter><timing offset>.
compositor/context.ts + index.ts: add rctx.filterTime (un-wrapped scene time); applyFilter evaluates filter curves there instead of the wrapped content time.
compositor/filters/registry.ts: makeContext samples filter curves at (sceneTime - filter.timingOffsetSec).
timemap.ts: DROP-ZONE CONTENT-GAP BRIDGE holds A across [A.out, B.in) for a pure 2-drop-zone crossfade (gated extraContentLayers===0 so Stylized/Slide's panel montage is untouched).

gate_result.no_hardcode: pass (all 7 detectors fire on >=2 transitions; no per-slug constants)
gate_result.cousin_360_bloom: 360°__360°_Bloom unchanged at 11.58 (its Bloom filter carries no timing offset)
